message:
perf(tui): throttle full DB snapshots when PRAGMA data_version unavailable, enhance analytics status strip

- Poller: add last_full_snapshot_micros to PollerConnectionState and
  throttle expensive full aggregate queries to once every 30 seconds when
  PRAGMA data_version is unavailable (e.g. FrankenSQLite backends),
  preventing CPU burn on 2-second poll cycles
- Poller: refactor data_version comparison into a clear version_unchanged
  boolean for better readability
- Analytics: expand render_status_strip() with compact_hint_visible
  parameter and reworked layout to show richer status information in the
  analytics dashboard while gracefully degrading in narrow viewports
- Screen registry: update analytics and system_health screen constructors
  to match new signatures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
